'''Torga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. He worked from [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] during the rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He supplied many things that were illegal even on Nar Shaddaa. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Torga was the target of a failed assassination attempt. He went into hiding in his fortress on Nar Shaddaa, and rarely showed himself in public. However, he continued to work toward forming an alliance with [[Jolla]] the Hutt, hoping to get some profit. He then decided to hire a group of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] to locate [[Nak Simm]]'s killer and expose [[Moska]]—his rival—as the brains behind the assassination attempts. He presented their evidence to Jolla at a grand party, but Jolla merely shrugged it off, and Torga's plan backfired.
